raw_consumer_statement: Dear CFPB. Thank you so much for your help. I'd like to file a complain American Express dispute team. I've filed dispute this summer. Then shockingly merchant responded with complete forgery of consent form with my fake signature that says " I agreed to non-refund policy '' OMG. Hello? anyone can win dispute if card issuer allows merchant to submit 100 % fake document. or American Express do not know what forgery means as a crime?! I submit rebuttal follow up how it's a forged document, provided a " clear '' evidence and my real signature what it should look like from public ID... However dispute team isn't carefully patiently go through and read my submission and responded to me I'm lost over a FAKE document that I didn't even signed for. This is insane. I'm shocked to know American Express is up to support evil criminal! Where is Justice? XXXX I'm with amex 23 years. They don't even keep a record of my real signature to XXXX to match. I had much more expectation to AMEX. so what I'm going to do is to hire. a lawyer and battle at court?
